raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje Joabs pee ta
Kehnixa / un stahstija winnam
to. Pehz aizinaja winsch Absa-
lomu / un tas nahze preeksch ta
Kehnixa/ un paklañijahs preeksch
ta us fawu Waigu pee Semines
preeksch ta Kehnixa/ un tas Keh-
nisch sluhpstija Absalomu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "fuhtis/ fazzidams: Nahz fchur/
ka es tew pee ta Kehnixa fuhtu/
un leekn fazzihit: Rapehz etmu eś
no Gesura nahzis? man buhtu
labbaki / ka es wehl tur buhtn.
Nu tad laid es ta Kehnixa Wai-
gu redsu/ bet ja weht kahds No-
seegums pee man irr/ tad laid
wiꞥſch mann nokauj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Absaloms
to: Raugi / tawas Leetas
iabbas un taifnas / bet tew
buhs Isklanfitajano ta Kehni
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Absalom
Ak! kant es taptu par Teefata
eeksch Semines eezelts / ka
man ikkatrs nahktu/ kam Ki
ieb zits Darbs buhtu/ ka es te
to Teefu nestu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad arridsan kahds
winna gabje paklannidame
tad issteep winsch fawu Reh
un fatwehre to/ un seuhpstija
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta darrija Absaloms n
fam Israëtam/ kas pee ta Keh
na nahze teesatees: Ta fa
Absaloms teem Israëta M
reem to Sirdi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz tfchetrdesmits G
deem fazzija Absaloms us
Kehnixa: Laid es jelle eenu /
mannu Apfohlischann Eebr
makfaju/ ko es tam KUNGA
fohlijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo taws Kalps irr ap
iidanees aptohlijees/ kad es
surā eeksch Sihtjas dsihwo
fazzidams: Ja tas KUNG
mann teefham atpakat w
dihs uhs Jerusalemi/ tad ka
tchn es tain KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehni
us to: Eij ar Meeru. Un wi
zehlehs/ un gabje uhs Eebron
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Absaloms bij Js
kus isfuhtijs pee wiſfahm J
eta Ziltim/ un lizzis fazzihit:
uhs tahs Trummuetes Skar
osirdefeet / tad buhs juws
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XV. Nodalla.
Absaloms zeff Dumpi prett fawu Tehwu Dah:
widu: 1. Darra ar faldeem Wahreem/ ka
tee faudis winnam peckerrahs: 4/ 6. Dah-
wids behg ar teem Gawajeem: 13/ 14. Un
padohdahs tai Deewa Sohdibai ar Pazee,
schanu: 16. Ne grib ka teem Preestereem buhs
lihds eet / bet fuhta tohs atpakat: 24. Ur
futteem arridsan Usajus/ Dahwida Drangs
atpakat greeschahs: 32/ 36.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pehz to likkahs Absa-
loms taifht Rattus un
Sirgus/ un peezdettmits
Wihrus/ kas winna Preekscha
tezzleja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir Absaloms zehlehs Rib-
tōs agri/ un stahweja tai Zetta
Puffē pee Wahrtin/ un kad jeb-
kuxam kahda Teefas-Leeta bija/
par ko winsch pee, ta Kehnixa
gahje teesatees/ to aizinaja Absa-
loms pee ferwi/ un fazzija: No
kuxa Pilsfahta efi tu? un kad
tas fazzija: Taws Kalps irr no
weenast to Israëta Zilfschu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
